name.value: EN TRANSLATION: Offshore and Dredging Engineering - semester 1
NL VERTALING: Offshore and Dredging Engineering - semester 1

description.value: EN TRANSLATION: This course is to conceive a realistic case related to the field of interest for a scientific report or article, and by reviewing recently submitted papers. Focusing on the transport problems. Data science can be observed in common food products.

NL VERTALING: This course is to conceive a realistic case related to the field of interest for a scientific report or article, and by reviewing recently submitted papers. Focusing on the transport problems. Data science can be observed in common food products.
